trends.headline: Beauty of Joseon Rice Sunscreen is SkinTok's no-white-cast summer staple
trends.body: The SPF 50+ rice-and-prebiotic sunscreen is surging again as creators prove its dewy, no-white-cast finish doubles as a makeup primer for hot-weather wear. Film a 'one swipe, zero cast' arm-test on deep skin tones, or a 'sunscreen as primer' GRWM showing makeup going on over it with no pilling.

metadata.context: K-beauty SPF going viral as a dewy, primer-friendly summer sunscreen

trends.headline: 'Cloud skin' is the soft-focus makeup finish replacing high-glow on BeautyTok
trends.body: Creators are chasing 'cloud skin' — a blurred, diffused matte-meets-dewy finish that mimics a digital filter in real life — as a softer alternative to mirror-glass glow. Shoot a 'cloud skin in 4 steps' tutorial or a side-by-side 'glass skin vs cloud skin' showing the soft-focus difference on camera.

metadata.context: Soft-focus 'filter in real life' makeup finish trending as the next glass-skin

trends.headline: Coastal cowgirl is FashionTok's defining summer styling formula
trends.body: The denim-meets-linen, wide-brim-hat coastal cowgirl aesthetic is dominating summer outfit content, with creators layering oversized western shirts over swimsuits in sandy-beige and ocean-blue palettes. Make a 'styling one western shirt 3 beach ways' transition reel or a 'coastal cowgirl on a budget' thrift haul.

metadata.context: Western-meets-beach styling aesthetic trending for summer outfit content

trends.headline: Wedge espadrilles are summer 2026's breakout FashionTok shoe
trends.body: Wedge espadrilles are being named a defining summer footwear trend, with creators styling them from sundresses to barrel-leg denim. Film a 'one espadrille, 5 outfits' lookbook or a 'are wedge espadrilles actually comfy?' all-day wear test.

metadata.context: Wedge espadrilles surfacing as the season's defining footwear trend

trends.headline: Coconut iced coffee is FoodTok's tropical drink of the summer
trends.body: Coconut milk and cream are taking over iced coffee content this year, prized for both the tropical flavor and the photogenic layered look creators love. Shoot a slow-pour 'coconut cold brew at home' ASMR or a 'cafe dupe: $2 coconut iced latte' cost-breakdown.

metadata.context: Coconut-infused iced coffee trending as the season's signature drink

trends.headline: 'Savoury-maxxing' girl-dinner snack plates are FoodTok's anti-sweet wave
trends.body: FoodTok is leaning hard into savoury — pickled-everything, salty snack plates and goat-cheese-on-a-chip 'girl dinner' boards are racking up views as the anti-dessert mood. Film a 'build a savoury girl-dinner board with me' or a 'pickle plate tier list' taste test.

metadata.context: Savoury snack-plate 'girl dinner' format trending against sweet treats

trends.headline: The '6-Week Tone & Transform' follow-along is FitTok's June group challenge
trends.body: A 30-minute deep-core follow-along challenge that kicked off June 1 is pulling FitTok into group-accountability content as creators post weekly check-ins. Start a 'Day 1 vs Day 7 of the 6-week challenge' progress series or a 'doing the follow-along with you in real time' POV.

metadata.context: 30-minute deep-core follow-along challenge driving June group fitness content

trends.headline: 'Pantry as the new walk-in wardrobe' is HomeTok's organization flex
trends.body: Color-coded condiments, labelled Kilner jars and zoned shelves have turned the kitchen pantry into HomeTok's most-demoed organization project. Film a 'restock and zone my pantry with me' ASMR or a 'budget pantry glow-up under $40' using decanted jars.

metadata.context: Pantry restocking and zoning trending as HomeTok's signature organization content

trends.headline: The Theragun Mini 2 is TechTok's quiet ASMR recovery gadget
trends.body: The Theragun Mini 2's notably quieter motor has made it a TechTok favorite in ASMR-style recovery and 'desk-worker stretch' content. Shoot a quiet 'end-of-day recovery routine' ASMR or a 'does the mini actually help tech neck?' honest review.

metadata.context: Quieter mini massage gun trending in ASMR recovery and review content

trends.headline: The Yoto Player is ParentTok's screen-free audio favorite
trends.body: The card-based Yoto Player is riding the anti-screen parenting wave as a screen-free way to play music and stories, with creators showcasing independent-play routines. Film a 'screen-free morning routine with the Yoto' or a 'honest 6-month Yoto review: worth it?' for toddler parents.

metadata.context: Card-based screen-free audio player trending in anti-screen parenting content

trends.headline: Double-sided deshedding brushes are PetTok's summer grooming must-buy
trends.body: A double-sided deshedding brush claiming up to 90% less shedding is going viral as summer coat-blow season hits, with creators posting jaw-dropping fur-pile reveals. Shoot a satisfying 'how much fur came off my husky' before/after or a 'deshedding brush vs the vacuum' ASMR groom.

metadata.context: Double-sided deshedding brush trending for summer shed season

trends.headline: Hyper-local 'destination dupe' videos are TravelTok's most-saved format
trends.body: TravelTok has shifted from broad city guides to hyper-specific hits — 'the one dumpling stall locals line up for' and '$50 a day here vs there' dupe comparisons that viewers tag friends in. Make a 'skip the tourist trap, go here instead' single-spot reel or a side-by-side 'expensive city vs its dupe' cost breakdown.

metadata.context: Hyper-local 'one spot' and dupe-comparison travel content driving saves

trends.headline: DIY charm necklaces are JewelryTok's maximalist summer craft
trends.body: Maximalist charm necklaces are replacing simple pendants as JewelryTok leans into storytelling and self-expression, and DIY charm-bar builds are the summer craft of choice. Film a 'build a charm necklace that tells your story' or a 'thrifted charms into one necklace' ASMR assembly.

metadata.context: Maximalist DIY charm necklaces trending as a personalized summer jewelry craft
